messageTemplates.title: Recruiter Follow-up
messageTemplates.body: Thank you for your message. I have prepared a concise prospect pack with my career profile, teaching evidence, QTS recommendation status, Project X teaching platform and professional recommendations: https://rvdez2015.github.io/rolandocvaldeshernandez/projectx/share/prospect-pack/

messageTemplates.title: School Application Follow-up
messageTemplates.body: For convenience, I have included a prospect pack with direct access to my professional portfolio, teaching evidence, Project X platform, curriculum work and recommendations: https://rvdez2015.github.io/rolandocvaldeshernandez/projectx/share/prospect-pack/
